creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Hello,

it took quite an amount of research to nail the patch to the port security/seahorse.

But since the report the software was upgraded several times and the patch did not apply any longer. I also could not find any other complain about this error for the new versions.

Therefore i think this PR is clearly overcome by events and should be closed.

Greetings,
Torsten
